subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-10
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou art wealthy through the treasury of the Kingdom. True wealth is the wealth of the Kingdom of God. The heart of man must be rich.
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @spiritual transformation, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @high station of the true believer, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
